raw_consumer_statement:
I placed an order with XXXX that was never delivered. 

I tried to dispute this online but that option was not available. 
I tried to dispute this by phone but they have a habit of disconnecting you " accidentally ' after long holds and many transfers. 
I have tried disputing this in writing as well with no success yet. I provided proof that XXXX acknowledged the item was shipped to the wrong address. 

The credit card company is purposely making this impossible in the hopes that consumers will give up.
